changelog: Fixed periodic UI freezes by making sync connection checks non-blocking on the main thread.
Reduced refresh bursts in MainWindow with safer debounce/cooldown behavior under heavy sync activity.
Notification polling now uses adaptive idle backoff to reduce load and keep the app responsive.
Auto updater now correctly parses GitHub Releases API payloads for version and download links.
Stability hardening validated with full automated test suite before release.
notes_ar: Stability-focused release that reduces sync freezes and improves safe auto-update behavior.
notes_en: This stability release reduces sync-related UI freezes, smooths refresh bursts, and improves auto-update compatibility with GitHub Releases.
